title: FALSE ALARM FAN MADE NGE OP Brazilian pt_BR dub
display_title: FALSE ALARM FAN MADE NGE OP Brazilian pt_BR dub
wikitext:
[]: [FALSE ALARM; FAN MADE] - NGE OP, Brazilian (pt_BR) dub             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 11, 2024 2:24 pm Seen on 𝕏 - tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) I found a LOST MEDIA YES, there was an evangelion opening entirely in Brazilian Portuguese, from the dubbing studio ÁLAMO, very cool.

[]: Re: Lost media - NGE OP, Brazilian (pt_BR) dub             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Tue Jun 11, 2024 8:51 pm Community notes say it's fanmade and I'm inclined to believe it. Singing sounds very amateurish and doesn't remind me of the anime OPs that did get dubbed at all, famous examples include Pokémon or Saint Seiya . I myself remember catching the Álamo dub on TV in 2010 and the OP wasn't dubbed. SPOILER: Show
